segments.speaker: S1
segments.sourceText: 그 새로운 웹툰 최신화 읽었어? 주인공 진짜 사기캐야.
segments.englishText: Did you read the latest chapter of that new webtoon? The main character is so overpowered.

segments.speaker: S2
segments.sourceText: 응! 단 한 번의 공격으로 보스를 쓰러뜨렸을 때 진짜 믿을 수가 없었어.
segments.englishText: Yes! I couldn't believe it when he defeated the boss with just one strike.

segments.speaker: S1
segments.sourceText: 내 말이! 다음 주 업데이트까지 어떻게 기다리지?
segments.englishText: I know, right? I can't wait for the next update next week.
